title: helichrysum nuratavicum
intro: Helichrysum nuratavicum, also known as Tibetan Everlasting or Immortelle, is a flowering plant native to the high-altitude regions of the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum nuratavicum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
